trigger.Name: Create_gate
trigger.script:
CreateNewDummyObject( "kef_gate", "VOROTA1", -1, -1, CVector(3929.008, 298.393, 3971.448), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.7056, 0.0000, 0.7086),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "kef_gate", "VOROTA2", -1, -1, CVector(3931.576, 300.000, 4156.916), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.7071, 0.0000, 0.7071),1 )
SetWeather(1)
CompleteQuest("sever_quest")
SetTolerance( 1066, 1029, RS_ALLY )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("krepost_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 11, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 1, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 2, 0.5 )
TActivate("Krepost_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Krepost_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3928.831, 272.884, 3867.715)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, 0.013, 0.001, -1.000)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(3906.231, 272.135, 3863.417)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.029, -0.003, -1.000)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Krepost_cin_vehicle" )
local Vorot1 = GetEntityByName("VOROTA1") if Vorot1 then Vorot1:Remove() end
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("krepost_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 18, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 3, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 4, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 5, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 )
TActivate("Krepost_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Krepost_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3918.767, 273.164, 4048.378)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.027, -0.999, -0.000, 0.021)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(3942.344, 272.493, 3856.009)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.011, 0.081, -0.997)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_felix", "HumSam1", -1, -1, CVector(3909.813, 271.600, 4044.918), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.6626, 0.0000, 0.7490),1 ) CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller", "HumPost1", -1, -1, CVector(3906.542, 271.600, 4045.056), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.7431, 0.0000, 0.6691),1 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin2_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Krepost_cin2_vehicle" )
local Chel1 = GetEntityByName("HumSam1") if Chel1 then Chel1:Remove() end
local Chel2 = GetEntityByName("HumPost1") if Chel2 then Chel2:Remove() end
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin3
trigger.script:
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("krepost_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 18, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 66661, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 66662, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 66663, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 66664, 0.5 )
TActivate("Krepost_cin3_vehicle") TActivate( "Krepost_cin3_end" ) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin3_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3918.767, 273.164, 4048.378)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.027, -0.999, -0.000, 0.021)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(3942.344, 272.493, 3856.009)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.011, 0.081, -0.997)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Krepost_cin3_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin
trigger.script:
local BasaTown = GetEntityByName("TownEast9699") if BasaTown then BasaTown:SetOpenGateToPlayer(false) end
TActivate("Zavod_cin_act")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin_act
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Zavod_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 19, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 7, 1 )
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 11118, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12118, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 8, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Zavod_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Zavod_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(1196.505, 262.899, 1741.342)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, -0.712, -0.001, -0.702)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(1139.822, 262.041, 1728.641)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.006, 0.145, 0.000, 0.989)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
local BasaTown = GetEntityByName("TownEast9699") if BasaTown then BasaTown:SetOpenGateToPlayer(true) end
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03")
SetTolerance( 1100, 1029, RS_ALLY )
TDeactivate( "Zavod_cin_vehicle" )
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted( "fm_Valky_1" )
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack1",1013,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"Hunter01","Fighter01","Ural00"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Zavod_valky_1" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_valky_1
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack2",1013,CVector(1658.089, 267.243, 1820.585),{"Ural01","Fighter01","Molokovoz01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Zavod_valky_2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_valky_2
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack3",1013,CVector(1729.265, 262.208, 1713.291),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Zavod_cin2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Zavod_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 9, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 11510, 2 ) AddCinematicMessage( 11, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12122, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12138, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 14114, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 9, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10, 2 ) AddCinematicMessage( 11, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 12, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 14, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Zavod_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Zavod_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(1551.000, 262.733, 1729.670)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.003, 0.748, 0.001, 0.663)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(1562.161, 261.899, 1709.402)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.020, 0.399, 0.002, 0.917)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
CreateVehicleEx("MirotvorecShot","Band_1", CVector(1617.130, 262.371, 1735.710), 1029) CreateVehicleEx("Cruiser01","Band_2", CVector(1614.928, 262.445, 1716.887), 1029) CreateVehicleEx("Ural03","Band_3", CVector(1628.265, 262.343, 1703.515), 1029) CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_2","Band_4", CVector(1651.052, 262.303, 1740.831), 1029)
local vehBand1 = GetEntityByName("Band_1") if vehBand1 then vehBand1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.824, -0.004, 0.566)) end
local vehBand2 = GetEntityByName("Band_2") if vehBand2 then vehBand2:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.014, -0.566, 0.007, 0.824)) end
local vehBand3 = GetEntityByName("Band_3") if vehBand3 then vehBand3:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.003, 0.773, 0.018, -0.634)) end
local vehBand4 = GetEntityByName("Band_4") if vehBand4 then vehBand4:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.003, 0.868, -0.002, -0.497)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Zavod_cin2_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Zavod_quest1")
local Vlkr1 = GetEntityByName("Band_1") if Vlkr1 then Vlkr1:Remove() end
local Vlkr2 = GetEntityByName("Band_2") if Vlkr2 then Vlkr2:Remove() end
local Vlkr3 = GetEntityByName("Band_3") if Vlkr3 then Vlkr3:Remove() end
local Vlkr4 = GetEntityByName("Band_4") if Vlkr4 then Vlkr4:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Mengira_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 1, 0 ) Fly("Mengira_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 14, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 15, 1 )
TActivate("Mengira_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Mengira_cin_dop_1") TActivate( "Mengira_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(6739.203, 253.597, 2283.120)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.020, 0.399, 0.002, 0.917)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 16, 1 )
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy1", -1, -1, CVector(7274.011, 235.000, 2032.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.217)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy2", -1, -1, CVector(7274.011, 235.000, 2032.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.4107, 0.0000, 0.9118), 3.217)
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack1",1013,CVector(7107.118, 235.520, 2190.272),{"Hunter01","Fighter01","Ural00","Fighter02"}, nil, 1)
TDeactivate( "Mengira_cin_dop_1" )
TActivate("Mengira_cin_vehicle_die_1") TActivate("Mengira_valky_1")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin_vehicle_die_1
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer1 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_valky_1
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack2",1013,CVector(7035.089, 235.243, 1974.585),{"Ural01","Fighter01","Hunter01","Molokovoz01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_valky_2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_valky_2
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack3",1013,CVector(7079.265, 235.208, 2209.291),{"Cruiser01" ,"CoolBelaz", "Ural01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_cin2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Mengira_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 17, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 18, 0.5 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 19, 0.5 ) end AddCinematicMessage( 20, 0.5 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 21176, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 21, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Mengira_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Mengira_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(7135.237, 237.392, 2071.386)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, -0.255, -0.000, 0.967)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin2_vehicle_Repair
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyRepair1", -1, -1, CVector(7135.237, 237.392, 2071.386), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.607)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_cin2_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Mengiri_quest1")
local engr1 = GetEntityByName("EnergyRepair1") if engr1 then engr1:Remove() end
TDeactivate("Mengira_cin2_vehicle_Repair")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
local vehPlayer12 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer12 then vehPlayer12:AddModifier("hp","= 2500") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_Open_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue03")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Vorota_Op_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7, 1, 0 ) Fly("Vorota_Op_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7.5, 0, 0 ) Fly("Vorota_Op_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 8, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 22, 1 )
TActivate("Vorota_Open_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Vorota_Open_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Vorota_Open_cin_dop_2") TActivate( "Vorota_Open_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_Open_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3931.844, 273.756, 4085.895)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, -0.001, -0.000, 1.000)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(3942.344, 272.493, 3856.009)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 0.011, 0.081, -0.997)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_Open_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA2") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Open_1", 15 ) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_Open_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer1 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:SetExternalPathByName("Vorota_path") end
AddCinematicMessage( 23, 0.5 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_Open_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate("Vorota_Open_cin_vehicle")
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Vorota_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Vorota_path") end
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA2") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Close_1", 5 ) end
TDeactivate("Vorota_Open_cin_dop_1") TDeactivate("Vorota_Open_cin_dop_2")
TActivate("CLOSE_VOR") TActivate("OPEN_VOR") TActivate("Mengira_2_cin")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CLOSE_VOR
trigger.script: local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA2") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Close_1", 5 ) end

trigger.Name: OPEN_VOR
trigger.script: local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA2") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Open_1", 5 ) end

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy21", -1, -1, CVector(6405.234, 270.429, 4905.833), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.217)
Fly("Mengira_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 9, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 24, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 25, 0.5 )
TActivate("Mengira_2_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Mengira_2_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(6157.983, 272.161, 4922.308)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.020, 0.399, 0.002, 0.917)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03b")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy22", -1, -1, CVector(6405.234, 270.429, 4905.833), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.4107, 0.0000, 0.9118), 3.217)
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack1",1013,CVector(6244.345, 272.772, 4887.771),{"Hunter01","Fighter01","Ural00","Fighter02"}, nil, 1)
TActivate("Mengira_2_cin_vehicle_die_1") TActivate("Mengira_2_cin_valky_1")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin_vehicle_die_1
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer1 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin_valky_1
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack2",1013,CVector(6294.154, 272.840, 4996.570),{"Ural02","Fighter01","Hunter01","Cruiser02"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_2_cin_valky_2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin_valky_2
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack3",1013,CVector(6244.345, 272.772, 4887.771),{"Cruiser01" ,"CoolBelaz_2", "Ural01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_2_cin2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Mengira_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 26, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 27, 0.5 )
TActivate("Mengira_2_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Mengira_2_cin2_vehicle_Repair" ) TActivate( "Mengira_2_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(6244.345, 272.772, 4887.771)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, -0.513, -0.000, 0.858)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin2_vehicle_Repair
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyRepair1", -1, -1, CVector(6244.345, 272.772, 4887.771), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.507)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_2_cin2_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Mengiri_quest3")
local engr1 = GetEntityByName("EnergyRepair1") if engr1 then engr1:Remove() end
TDeactivate("Mengira_2_cin2_vehicle_Repair")
TActivate("Mengira_3_cin")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
local vehPlayer12 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer12 then vehPlayer12:AddModifier("hp","= 2500") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy31", -1, -1, CVector(656.119, 270.429, 5383.616), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.217)
Fly("Mengira_cam06", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 9, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 28, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 29, 0.5 )
TActivate("Mengira_3_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "Mengira_3_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(858.652, 272.515, 5284.485)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.020, 0.399, 0.002, 0.917)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03b")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "Energy32", -1, -1, CVector(656.119, 270.429, 5383.616), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.4107, 0.0000, 0.9118), 3.217)
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack1",1013,CVector(772.174, 272.782, 5302.953),{"Hunter01","Fighter02","Ural00","Belaz01"}, nil, 1)
TActivate("Mengira_3_cin_vehicle_die_1") TActivate("Mengira_3_cin_valky_1")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin_vehicle_die_1
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer1 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin_valky_1
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack2",1013,CVector(644.563, 272.886, 5242.938),{"Ural03","Fighter01","Hunter01","Cruiser02"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_3_cin_valky_2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin_valky_2
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("ValkyAtack3",1013,CVector(772.174, 272.782, 5302.953),{"Cruiser02" ,"CoolBelaz_2", "Ural00"}, nil, 1)
TActivate( "Mengira_3_cin2" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin2
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Mengira_cam07", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 30, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 31, 0.5 )
TActivate("Mengira_3_cin2_vehicle") TActivate( "Mengira_3_cin2_vehicle_Repair" ) TActivate( "Mengira_3_cin2_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(772.174, 272.782, 5302.953)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, 0.711, 0.001, 0.703)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin2_vehicle_Repair
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyRepair1", -1, -1, CVector(772.174, 272.782, 5302.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.507)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mengira_3_cin2_end
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Mengiri_quest4")
local engr1 = GetEntityByName("EnergyRepair1") if engr1 then engr1:Remove() end
TDeactivate("Mengira_3_cin2_vehicle_Repair")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
local vehPlayer12 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer12 then vehPlayer12:AddModifier("hp","= 2500") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: ATIVATE_TRIGGERS
trigger.script:
TDeactivate("triggerLdina") TActivate("IN_LDINA") TActivate("FROM_LDINA") TActivate("Mother_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: IN_LDINA
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:LimitMaxSpeed(20) end

trigger.Name: FROM_LDINA
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:UnlimitMaxSpeed() end

trigger.Name: Mother_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Bitva_quest1")
PlayCustomMusic("Techno01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
SetWeather(0)
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_lisa", "HumSam1", -1, -1, CVector(3914.083, 387.779, 7807.931), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.9974, 0.0000, 0.0719),1 )
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(3918.635, 391.907, 7815.132), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
FlyLinked( "Mother_cam01", CTochID, 12, 1, 0, PlfID ) Fly("Mother_cam022", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 17, 0, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 16, 0, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 10, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 32111, 4 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 32, 4 ) end
TActivate("Mother_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Mother_cin_dop_11") TActivate("Mother_cin_dop_1")
TActivate( "Mother_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Valky_path") end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(3782.484, 273.025, 7067.759)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.011, -0.026, -0.026, 0.999)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_dop_11
trigger.script:
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 33111, 2 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 33, 2 ) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 34111, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 35111, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 35112, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 34, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 35, 0.5 ) end
getObj("HumSam1"):SetNodeAction(AT_STAND2) getObj("HumSam1"):SetNextForAnimation(AT_STAND2, AT_STAND1)
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
CreateNewDummyObject( "big_crag_7", "kamenb1", -1, -1, CVector(3813.046, 271.000, 7060.858), Quaternion(0.0000, -0.6593, 0.0000, 0.7518),0 )
TActivate("Mother_cin_dop_2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_1")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_1
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng111", -1, -1, CVector(3555.011, 345.700, 7088.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_2
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng222", -1, -1, CVector(3432.011, 343.000, 7433.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_3")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_3
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng333", -1, -1, CVector(3560.011, 345.600, 7859.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_4")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_4
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng444", -1, -1, CVector(4133.011, 336.000, 7773.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_5")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_5
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng555", -1, -1, CVector(4203.711, 311.000, 7373.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyON_6")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyON_6
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng666", -1, -1, CVector(4030.011, 322.000, 7107.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_end
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng11", -1, -1, CVector(3555.011, 345.700, 7088.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng12", -1, -1, CVector(3432.011, 343.000, 7433.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng13", -1, -1, CVector(3560.011, 345.600, 7859.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng14", -1, -1, CVector(4133.011, 336.000, 7773.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng15", -1, -1, CVector(4203.711, 311.000, 7373.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyMeng16", -1, -1, CVector(4030.011, 322.000, 7107.620), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.000)
SetWeather(1)
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Valky_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Valky_path") end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetExternalPathByName("ValkyFur_path") VehCarFur1:PlaceToEndOfPath("ValkyFur_path") end
end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
PlayCustomMusic("Phase01")
TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl1",1013,CVector(3612.174, 270.782, 7557.953),{"Hunter02","Fighter02","Ural00","Scout03"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl2",1013,CVector(4002.174, 269.782, 7572.953),{"CoolBelaz_2","Fighter02","Hunter02","Scout03"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl3",1013,CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7323.953),{"Hunter01","Fighter02","Ural00","Fighter01"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1)
TDeactivate( "Mother_cin_dop_1" ) TDeactivate( "Mother_cin_dop_11" ) TDeactivate( "Mother_cin_dop_2" ) TActivate("trValkyDIE_1")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trREPAIRPLAYER
trigger.script: local vehPlayer12 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer12 then vehPlayer12:AddModifier("hp","+ 11") end

trigger.Name: trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP
trigger.script:
TDeactivate("trREPAIRPLAYER")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_1
trigger.script:
trigger:IncCount() local count = trigger:GetCount() if 3>count then return end
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted("fm_Valky_DIE_1")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyREPAIR_1", -1, -1, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.000)
TActivate("EnergyRemove") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP")
TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl11",1013,CVector(3817.174, 270.782, 7591.953),{"CoolBelaz","Fighter02","Ural01","Scout03"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl22",1013,CVector(3643.174, 270.782, 7356.953),{"Fighter02","Hunter02","Cruiser02"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl33",1013,CVector(3978.174, 266.782, 7366.953),{"Hunter01","Molokovoz01","Ural01","Fighter01"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1)
TActivate("trValkyDIE_2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: EnergyRemove
trigger.script:
local EngRep1 = GetEntityByName("EnergyREPAIR_1") if EngRep1 then EngRep1:Remove() end
local EngRep2 = GetEntityByName("EnergyREPAIR_2") if EngRep2 then EngRep2:Remove() end
local EngRep3 = GetEntityByName("EnergyREPAIR_3") if EngRep3 then EngRep3:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_2
trigger.script:
trigger:IncCount() local count = trigger:GetCount() if 3>count then return end
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted("fm_Valky_DIE_1")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyREPAIR_1", -1, -1, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.000)
TActivate("EnergyRemove")
TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP")
TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl111",1013,CVector(3612.174, 270.782, 7557.953),{"Ural01","Fighter02","Ural03","Cruiser02"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl222",1013,CVector(4002.174, 269.782, 7572.953),{"CoolBelaz_2","Fighter02","Hunter02","Ural02"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1) TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl333",1013,CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7323.953),{"Dozer01","Cruiser01","Ural01","Cruiser01"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1)
TActivate("trValkyDIE_3") TActivate("trValkyDIE_Repair_1") TActivate("trValkyDIE_Repair_2") TActivate("trValkyDIE_Repair_3")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_Repair_1
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted("fm_Valky_DIE_1")
TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyREPAIR_1", -1, -1, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.000)
TActivate("EnergyRemove")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_Repair_2
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted("fm_Valky_DIE_1")
TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyREPAIR_2", -1, -1, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.000)
TActivate("EnergyRemove")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_Repair_3
trigger.script:
AddImportantFadingMsgByStrIdFormatted("fm_Valky_DIE_1")
TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER") TActivate("trREPAIRPLAYER_STOP")
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_ORACUL_MAIN5", "EnergyREPAIR_3", -1, -1, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.000)
TActivate("EnergyRemove")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: trValkyDIE_3
trigger.script:
trigger:IncCount() local count = trigger:GetCount() if 3>count then return end
local Mamka1 = GetEntityByName("HumSam1") if Mamka1 then Mamka1:Remove() end
TActivate("FinalBtl_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: FinalBtl_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Phase02")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
TeamCreate("ValkyFinlBtl1111",1013,CVector(3818.277, 272.829, 7659.494),{"MirotvorecValky"}, CVector(3811.174, 270.782, 7461.953), 1)
local vehPer1 = GetEntityByName("ValkyFinlBtl1111_vehicle_0") if vehPer1 then vehPer1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.001, 1.000, -0.002, 0.007)) vehPer1:setImmortalMode(1) vehPer1:SetSkin(7) end
Fly("Mother_cam04", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 15, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 36111, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 36, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("FinalBtl_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "FinalBtl_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: FinalBtl_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: FinalBtl_cin_activate1
trigger.script:
local vehPer11122 = GetEntityByName("ValkyFinlBtl1111_vehicle_0") if vehPer11122 then vehPer11122:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: FinalBtl_cin_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
PlayCustomMusic("Phase02_2")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TActivate("Final_cin") TActivate("FinalBtl_cin_activate1")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("Bitva_quest2")
TDeactivate("FinalBtl_cin_activate1") PlayCustomMusic("Phase03")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
SetWeather(0)
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_lisa", "HumKats1", -1, -1, CVector(3823.830, 270.531, 7542.995), Quaternion(0.0390, -0.7242, -0.6872, -0.0411),1 )
local vehPer11 = GetEntityByName("ValkyFinlBtl1111_vehicle_0") if vehPer11 then vehPer11:SetPosition( CVector(3839.381, 272.799, 7550.084)) vehPer11:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, 1.000, 0.000, 0.003)) end
Fly("Mother_cam05", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 8, 1, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam06", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 11, 0, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam07", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 14, 0, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam08", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12.5, 0, 0 ) Fly("Mother_cam09", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 21.5, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate("Final_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Final_cin_mother_die") TActivate("Final_cin_dop_11") TActivate("Final_cin_dop_1")
TActivate( "Final_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_mother_die
trigger.script:
local vehPer111 = GetEntityByName("ValkyFinlBtl1111_vehicle_0") if vehPer111 then vehPer111:setImmortalMode(0) vehPer111:AddModifier("hp","= 0") end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3810.810, 272.806, 7529.539)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.000, 0.000, -0.000, -1.000)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_dop_11
trigger.script:
CreateNewDummyObject( "dweller_felix", "HumKats2", -1, -1, CVector(3821.620, 270.428, 7541.943), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.3624, 0.0000, 0.9320),1 )
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_1")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 37, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 38, 0.5 )
PlayCustomMusic("Sadness1")
TActivate("Final_cin_dop_2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_dop_2
trigger.script:
AddCinematicMessage( 39, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 40, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 41, 2 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 41111, 0.5 ) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_1
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng666") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng16") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_2
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng555") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng15") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_3")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_3
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng444") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng14") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_4")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_4
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng333") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng13") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_5")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_5
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng222") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng12") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_6")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Mother_cin_energyOFF_6
trigger.script:
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng111") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("EnergyMeng11") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Final_cin_end
trigger.script:
TActivate("Mother_cin_energyOFF_1")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
AddBook("r1_book_cold_winter")
SetTolerance( 1100, 1013, RS_ALLY )
local vehPlayer1 = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer1 then vehPlayer1:AddModifier("hp","= 2500") end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("kamenb1") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
local sammy1 = GetEntityByName("HumKats2") if sammy1 then sammy1:Remove() end
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
TDeactivate( "Final_cin_dop_1" ) TDeactivate( "Final_cin_dop_11" ) TDeactivate( "Final_cin_dop_2" ) TActivate("ChangeCar_cin")
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: ChangeCar_cin
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Techno01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateVehicleEx("MazForPlayer03","UltraCar1", CVector(7664.007, 246.132, 705.510), 1100)
local vehBand1 = GetEntityByName("UltraCar1") if vehBand1 then vehBand1:SetPosition( CVector(7664.007, 246.132, 705.510)) vehBand1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.000, -0.686, -0.000, 0.728)) end
Fly("ChangeCar_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 42, 1 )
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 42111, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("ChangeCar_cin_vehicle") TActivate( "ChangeCar_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: ChangeCar_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: ChangeCar_cin_end
trigger.script:
SpawnMessageBox("8806")
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TActivate("ChangeCar_cin_activate1")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: ChangeCar_cin_activate1
trigger.script:
cargo(4)
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:AddItemsToRepository("hailSideGun", 1) end
trigger:Deactivate()
